texto: One, just one, but definitely one of the great benefits of private prayer is that you can’t hide from your motives. In corporate prayer, we can sound like “all that”. We can blow Jesus smoke like nobody’s bizness in a crowd but, get alone with Him, and He won’t let you get away with the fake stuff. Try blowing Jesus smoke in your prayer closet and you’ll cough on it every time. Truth? That penetrating gaze of His hurts, but afterwards, it never fails to heal.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Shellie Rushing Tomlinson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “One, just one, but definitely one of the great benefits of private prayer is that you can’t hide …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, faith, jesus pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de jesus e jesus-christ.
